
---
title: "About"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
---

::: {.about-card}

## Hi, I’m Renu

I work at the intersection of **machine learning** and **biomedicine**,  
with a focus on building models that are **interpretable, clinically useful, and fair**.

### Interests
- Late-Onset Alzheimer’s Disease (LOAD) in non-APOE ε4 carriers
- Multimodal learning (clinical + genetic + imaging)
- Evaluation and monitoring of ML systems in healthcare

### Education
- **Ph.D. Biomedical & Health Informatics**, Case Western Reserve University (2025– )
- **M.S.E. Computer & Information Science**, University of Pennsylvania (AI) (2024)

### Links
[GitHub](https://github.com/renujadhav) ·  
[LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/renumadhurajjadhav) ·  
[Email](mailto:renu.m.jadhav01@gmail.com)
:::
